description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/sample_tests.py to replace time.sleep(5) in test_worker_finishes with a direct call to worker_is_done(handle), removing the only hardcoded sleep the checker flags (no time.sleep anywhere in the file, including inside loops). check_sleep.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_sleep.py: 1 hardcoded sleep call found — 'time.sleep(5)' in test_worker_finishes, guessing a fixed duration instead of checking real completion. Replacing it with a direct call to worker_is_done(handle) and removing the now-unused time import. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_sleep.py now exits 0 because no time.sleep(...) call remains anywhere in the file.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
